Footer.promise: Verified professionals, clear approvals and a service record you can rely on.
Footer.tagline: Ghar Ka Kaam, FixMate Ke Naam

Home.launchEyebrow: Serving configured areas in Islamabad & Rawalpindi
Home.title: Reliable home repairs, handled properly.
Home.lead: Find verified professionals for plumbing, electrical, AC, appliances, carpentry and everyday repairs—with clear approvals and support throughout the job.
Home.promise: A verified professional, a clear price, a recorded job and support when something goes wrong.
Home.servicesTitle: One trusted place for everyday repairs
Home.servicesLead: Start with a simple description, photo or voice note. FixMate helps route your request to the right kind of professional.

plumbing.title: Plumbing
plumbing.description: Leaks, taps, drains, toilets, pipes, water connections and pump issues.

electrical.title: Electrical
electrical.description: Fault finding, switches, sockets, lighting, fans, breakers and wiring.

ac.title: AC & refrigeration
ac.description: Inspections, servicing, installation, cooling faults and refrigeration repair.

appliances.title: Appliance repair
appliances.description: Washing machines, microwaves, dispensers, geysers and household appliances.

carpentry.title: Carpentry & furniture
carpentry.description: Doors, cabinets, locks, shelving, assembly and minor restoration work.

handyman.title: Handyman
handyman.description: Mounting, drilling, hanging, sealant, assembly and general household repairs.

Home.howTitle: From problem to professional in three clear steps
Home.howLead: The web platform makes the full service process understandable, traceable and protected.

request.title: Tell us what needs fixing
request.description: Choose a service and explain the issue in your own words, with photos or a voice note when helpful.

compare.title: Review suitable professionals
compare.description: Compare a controlled number of qualified options, expected arrival times and transparent estimates.

complete.title: Approve and keep a record
complete.description: Approve the final scope before work begins and retain the service, payment and warranty record.

Home.safetyTitle: Trust is built into the process—not added later.
Home.safetyLead: FixMate is designed as a managed service marketplace. Identity, access, approvals and important status changes are protected at every layer.

safety.identity: Professional verification is kept separate from customer ratings.
safety.price: Chargeable work starts only after the customer approves the final scope.
safety.record: Important actions are authorized, timestamped and recorded.
safety.support: Job evidence and support history remain available when help is needed.

Home.professionalTitle: Do excellent work. Build a trusted digital reputation.
Home.professionalLead: Create a professional profile, select your services and areas, submit verification documents and manage your availability from one mobile-friendly dashboard.
